# Cooler Master — Liquid Cooling Components + Enterprise OEM
Last updated: 2026-04-01

## Company Overview
- **HQ:** Taipei, Taiwan
- Private company (Cooler Master Co., Ltd.)
- Revenue: ~$500M-1B USD estimated
- Known for: consumer PC cooling, chassis, power supplies
- Enterprise/OEM division: growing rapidly since 2022

## Role in NVL72 Supply Chain
- Cooler Master's enterprise OEM division supplies **liquid cooling components** for AI server applications
- Products potentially inside NVL72 trays: cold plate assemblies, manifold routing components, coolant distribution fittings
- Cooler Master has positioned their enterprise division as a supplier to server ODMs (Foxconn, Quanta, Wistron)
- They have CDU products and rack-level liquid cooling systems for enterprise deployments

## Enterprise Products Relevant to NVL72
- MasterLiquid Enterprise line — cold plates, manifolds, CDUs
- OEM cold plate assemblies (custom form factor for GPU servers)
- Rack-level liquid cooling manifolds and distribution hardware
- CDU units for enterprise deployments (smaller scale than CoolIT CHx2000)

## ADC Relevance
- Cooler Master enterprise = potential secondary source for cold plates and manifold components
- If CoolIT or Boyd has lead time constraints, Cooler Master enterprise OEM is a potential alternative
- Worth qualifying as backup supplier for ADC 3K pod liquid cooling components
